introSection: Tantrum is a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Darien Lake in Darien Center, New York, USA. It is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter model roller coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In early November 2017, planning documents revealed details of a new roller coaster at Darien Lake which would replace the park's log flume, Thunder Rapids. Later that month, the park officially announced Tantrum.

The ride's installation was handled by Ride Entertainment.

Tantrum opened to guests on May 25, 2018 with a grand opening held on June 1.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Tantrum is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter 380 model roller coaster and clone of Iron Shark at Galveston Island Historic Pleasure Pier. It has green track and orange supports. The official color codes are RAL-2011 Deep Orange, and RAL-6018 Yellow Green.

fullText:
Tantrum is a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Darien Lake in Darien Center, New York, USA. It is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter model roller coaster.

In early November 2017, planning documents revealed details of a new roller coaster at Darien Lake which would replace the park's log flume, Thunder Rapids. Later that month, the park officially announced Tantrum.

The ride's installation was handled by Ride Entertainment.

Tantrum opened to guests on May 25, 2018 with a grand opening held on June 1.

Tantrum is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter 380 model roller coaster and clone of Iron Shark at Galveston Island Historic Pleasure Pier. It has green track and orange supports. The official color codes are RAL-2011 Deep Orange, and RAL-6018 Yellow Green.
